pageContext.name: One Last Lesson: Ahsoka Tano vs Darth Maul
pageContext.description: Every choice you have made … has led you to this moment.   Sideshow Art Prints and ACME Archives present the One Last Lesson: Ahsoka Tano™ vs Darth Maul™ Fine Art Print, a thrilling piece of officially licensed Star Wars™ artwork by artist Ian MacDonald.  Based on the epic standoff seen in Star Wars: The Clone Wars™, this colorful composition revisits the fated duel between ex-Padawan™ Ahsoka Tano and the former Sith™ Darth Maul. The foes ignite their unique lightsabers and charge into battle, clashing in the throne room of Mandalore™ during a devastating siege. Meanwhile, echoes of their former selves can be seen in the illustration, showing just how greatly these learners have grown since they first began finding their way in the Force.  Each One Last Lesson: Ahsoka Tano vs Darth Maul Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and includes a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 750 pieces. This exhilarating Star Wars wall art is a must-have moment in galactic history for fans.  Use what you have learned and bring home the One Last Lesson: Ahsoka Tano vs Darth Maul Fine Art Print by Ian MacDonald for your Clone Wars collection today!
